This is what is really awesome. You do not have to be an expert in anything. You can just be
someone going through something, and going through something that you’re charting your
journal about. For example let’s say that you’re in debt and you file for bankruptcy.
You could write an info product on, how I’m surviving bankruptcy. You’re not an expert,
you’re a person going through bankruptcy, and you are saying here’s what I’m learning as
I’m going through bankruptcy. All you do is document everything that you learn, and you put
it into an info product.
Do you know how many people are more interested in reading someone’s journey than

interested in the journey.
There are a lot of television shows that support that. They’re called Reality TV Shows. So

This is so good for like weight loss, or for making money online, or anything that while

A cons list is something that you need to consider. In other words, what you want to do is that

materials. You can say in your book you’ll have the case against silver, because people
immediately trust you more.
